title: あたし、勝ちたいンです！

text_block_list.text: The day of Yukino Bijin's scrimmage arrives.

After watching over her training with Sakura
Bakushin O, I can't help but feel curious about
how the race will pan out, so I drop by to watch.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, howdy-do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the right headspace thanks to you 'n
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All you've gotta do now is race and win! Good
luck, Yukino!
choice_data_list: Show us how cool you can be!
Let's see how much your training's paid off!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I was talk'n to the folks from my hometown, and
they've all got high hopes for me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: So there's no way I'm losing!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get first place and show 'em how
amaz'n I've become!

Yukino Bijin heads off with a confident stride. The
look on her face is a far cry from the one she had
before her intense training.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'm gonna use every trick Bakushin O
taught me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're an Umamusume who's been trained by the
class representative herself! First place is yours
for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much. I'm gonna run my heart out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go for it! Your instructor will be watching
attentively from the stands!

We part ways with Yukino Bijin, and I wait for the
race to start alongside Sakura Bakushin O, who
has embraced the role of instructor.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yukino. I saw a banner with your name on it
just now.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, from my hometown support'rs! They came all
the way here to cheer me on.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? Well...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My desire to make the folks back home happy is
just as strong as yours. I won't lose today.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (Oguri wants to win just as much as I do... But...)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yukinooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Yukino Bijiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-you guys!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's me, Yukino Bijin! I'm gonna show everyone
the kinda guts the snowy lands'll give ya!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I really wanna get first place! I wanna run a great
race and hear them call me a city girl!)

With the racers' entrances over, the race is finally
about to begin.

The odds are in Oguri Cap's favor for this race,
but an unexpected Umamusume pulls out to the
front from the get-go...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When push comes to shove, I get things done! I'm
not gonna lose to Oguri or anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'll show ever'one my Morioka spirit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoooooa! Yukino's pulling further and further
ahead!
choice_data_list: You can do it, Yukino Bijin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That crazed energy is totally class rep
worthy!

If she keeps that up, she's got this... I watch with
bated breath as the race unfolds...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay... I've got you now, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
N-not on my watch! You're not tak'n first place
from me!

Oguri Cap pulls off a miraculous chase and
gradually closes the gap with Yukino Bijin. Yukino
Bijin battens down and speeds up, buuut...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: It's Oguri! She came from behind and won it all!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: That other girl... Yukino, was it? She did a great job, but ended up in second. Man, Oguri sure is fast.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I failed... I wanted to show 'em how cool I
could be...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You didn't fail. Listen. Can't you hear them
cheering?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Congrats on second place, Yukino! You're
Morioka's pride and joy!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You've become so fast and magnificent! You're a
true city girl now!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Everyone!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The cheers keep on com'n... like a never-end'n
supply of wanko soba.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I did it... I gave my hometown a performance to
be proud of...)

She may have ended up in second place, but it's
clear that today's race has made Yukino Bijin
stronger in both mind and body.
